installedSkills.name: mysql
installedSkills.reason: App runs entirely on MySQL via PDO (config/database.php, public/api/*.php); safe read-only queries to verify schema/seed data and debug stats endpoints

installedSkills.name: owasp-security
installedSkills.reason: Public PHP API takes user input (CSV import, query params) and ships exposed debug/test PHP files (debug-images.php, test-api-direct.php, test-env.php, diagnostic.php)

installedSkills.name: webapp-testing
installedSkills.reason: Playwright-driven testing of the localhost:8080 dashboard and API endpoints

installedSkills.name: api-documentation
installedSkills.reason: Nine public/api/*.php endpoints have no formal spec — generate endpoint/auth/response docs

excludedGlobals.name: framer
excludedGlobals.reason: Framer SaaS website builder — irrelevant to a self-hosted PHP/MySQL app

excludedGlobals.reason: Framer React component authoring — no Framer/React in this repo
